cn.description:
生日，毕业，婚礼，搬迁， 开工， 纪念日， 周庆等等， 怎么记得住呀！
简易设计， 清新画风， 让DDay 圈中那一日

马上就能找到物品的简单管理软件！

整理整顿后找不到东西，是不是很困扰吗？

使用“哪里哪里”就能马上找到要找的东西！


建造房子，制作家具，分配储物柜，把东西全部放进去吧。


书籍和重要的收藏、兴趣的道具、孩子的玩具、季节的衣服、回忆的物品等，有助于整理家里所有的东西。

无论是不能扔东西的人，还是非常喜欢整理整顿东西的人，这都是非常适合的应用程序。

hk.trackCensoredName: Eco Power Towns （生態小鎮電力計畫）
hk.trackName: Eco Power Towns （生態小鎮電力計畫）
hk.description:
你能用再生能源點亮整座小鎮嗎？
《Eco Power Towns》是一款溫暖又講究策略的益智遊戲。你必須妥善運用資源，在合適的地形上放置太陽能板、風力發電機、生質能設施或潮汐電廠，達成能源目標，照亮森林中的每一棟小屋。

這是一款完全無文字的遊戲，透過清晰的圖像與直覺式設計，讓每位玩家都能輕鬆上手。不論你是喜歡挑戰思考，還是想要一場放鬆療癒的體驗，這裡都能找到樂趣。

遊戲特色：
完全無文字介面，靠圖示與設計即可理解規則
在草地、山丘、沼澤、岩地中規劃發電設
遇到卡關也有提示系統可幫助你前進
研究升級，提升能源效率與建設效率
每一關都是手工設計，難度逐步提升
計畫得宜就能解開令人滿足的解謎體驗
沉浸在舒適的 lo-fi 音樂與簡約美術風格中
無廣告、無內購、無追蹤，完全付費解鎖
支援觸覺回饋（Haptic Feedback）
支援 Game Center 成就系統

我是獨立開發者，一人打造了這款用心的小遊戲。
希望《Eco Power Towns》能讓你在療癒之中，也對永續能源多一份理解與思考。

生日，畢業， 婚禮， 搬遷， 開工 紀念日， 週慶等等， 怎麼記得住呀！
簡易設計， 清新畫風， 讓DDay, 圈中那一日

hk.releaseNotes: 我們做了一些小的改進。
hk.description:
變成日本的鐵路公司，挑戰世界上最繁忙的通勤高峰!

玩 "東京電車 "不需要任何鐵路知識。
這個遊戲是一個規則簡單的腦力遊戲，但需要大量的腦力。

顧客們在車站等待著火車的到來，把他們送到目的地。
啟動火車，運送你的顧客。

每一位登上火車的乘客，你都能賺到錢。
調整運行間隔和車廂數量，以達到最高收入。
發出列車要花錢。如果你發的火車太多，登車率下降，你將失去收入。

操作方法非常容易，規則也很簡單。
你所要做的就是調整火車車廂的數量，讓火車在最佳時間出發。
隨著遊戲的進行，快遞票價也會出現。

完全不需要技術知識。
喜歡火車的人和喜歡游戲的人都能很快理解並享受遊戲。

沒有應用內購買。沒有廣告。
請專注於遊戲。
在社交媒體上分享你的操作結果。

在台湾和日本鐵路線上駕駛電車並載客。

・簡單的益智遊戲
“東京電車２”是一款規則簡單的益智遊戲。無需專業知識。
火車迷，遊戲迷，人人都能享受。

・致所有將成為行動調度員的人
在日本的早晨，顧客們正在等待火車的到來去上班。
讓我們啟動火車並運送客戶。

- 遊戲目標
日本鐵路公司是營利性組織。讓我們以高營業利潤為目標吧！

・如何產生利潤
票價收入-出發成本=營業利潤。

票價收入是在車站的顧客登上火車時產生的。
示例）如果兩名乘客在票價為 20 的車站上車，他們將獲得 40。

發車費按發車時的車廂數收取。
示例）2 節車廂的火車為 30，4 節車廂的火車為 40，10 節車廂的火車為 70。


一個人可以乘坐一輛車。
票價收入是在乘客登上火車時產生的。
調整行駛距離和車輛數量以獲得最大利潤。
離境費用。如果你開的火車太多，而佔用率下降，你就會損失收入。

·操作方法
控制非常簡單，規則也很簡單。
你所要做的就是調整列車的車廂數量，讓列車在最佳時間出發。
隨著遊戲的進行，將會出現各種變化，例如特快列車和換乘站。

·體積
享受 50 多條路線。
請體驗日本鐵路公司的各種運輸策略。

- 沒有廣告，沒有計費
沒有應用內購買。無廣告。
請專心玩遊戲。孩子們可以安心地玩耍。
讓我們分享在 社交媒體 上駕駛的結果。

・鐵路玩
JR東日本、JR東海、JR西日本、JR九州、東武、東急、西武、京王、京急、京阪、阪急、阪神、近鐵、名鐵、小田急、南海、西鐵、相鐵、京成、東京地鐵、大阪地鐵、都營地鐵, 筑波快遞

・容量約130MB
存儲負擔也小。根本沒有繁重的處理。

A simple cleanup management app that will quickly find your search!

Do you have trouble Looking for items?

Find your item quickly with "where I put it”!

Build a house, make furniture, assign lockers, and put all your belongings.

Books, important collections, hobby tools, children's toys, seasonal clothes, and items of recollections, the app will help you organize all things in the house.

hk.releaseNotes:
Improved app performance and overall stability.
Updated table colors for a better visual experience.
Important: Please delete the old table if you have used it previously.
hk.description: The table features the player as a member of a space fleet that completes missions to increase rank. Players can attain nine different ranks (listed from lowest to highest): Cadet, Ensign, Lieutenant, Captain, LT Commander, Commander, Commodore, Admiral, and Fleet Admiral. Players accept a mission by hitting "mission targets" which select which mission they will take, and by going up the "launch ramp". Each mission has a set number of things for players to do, such as hitting the "attack bumpers" (which are a set of four bumpers at the top of the table) eight times (this is the "target practice" mission). Some missions involve a number of steps which must be completed in sequence. Missions end either by being completed, or by being aborted due to running out of "fuel", as indicated by the lights in the passage that passes under the launch ramp. The "fuel" lights go out one by one at a time interval, and can be re-lit by having the ball go over them, or all at once by going up the launch ramp again. Upon completing a mission, some of the blue lights in a circle in the middle of the table turn on. When all of the lights in the blue circle turn on, the player's rank increases, and a light in the orange circle turns on.

hk.releaseNotes:
- This update introducesd many new and updated airports world wide and also over 80 new landmarks

New Handmade Airports

    FAOR - Johannesburg, South Africa
    HKJK - Jomo Kenyatta, Nairobi
    RPME - Butuan, Philippines
    RPSP - Bohol-Panglao, Philippines
    RPVA - Tacloban City, Philippines
    RPVE - Caticlan, Philippines

Significant Updates

    EHAM - Amsterdam, Netherlands
    KCOS - Colorado Springs, USA
    LEBL - Barcelona, Spain
    LFLL - Lyon, France
    LIMC - Milan, Italy
    LIME - Orio al Serio, Italy
    LIML - Milano Linate, Italy
    LIPQ - Trieste, Italy
    LJLJ - Ljubljana, Slovenia
    LOWI - Innsbruck, Austria
    VABB - Mumbai, India

And minor changes to 100+ airports.
hk.description:
Aerofly FS Global is one of the most sophisticated Flight Simulators for your mobile device, suitable for beginner and professional flight sim pilots alike. Explore the world of flying with extremely detailed and accurately simulated airliners, fully interactive 3D cockpits and realistic aircraft systems. Fly with complex airliners, helicopters, business jets, fighter jets and warbirds, general aviation aircraft, aerobatic stuntplanes and gliders across the photorealistic landscape.

IMPORTANT NOTE: The level of graphics details depends on your device performance and memory.

▶ AIRCRAFT
8 aircraft included in the base app:
• Airbus A320, Dash 8-Q400, Learjet 45, Cessna 172, Baron 58, Aermacchi MB339, F-15E Strike Eagle, Jungmeister

Over 30 more aircraft available as in-app purchases, like Airbus A350, Airbus A380, Boeing B777, Boeing B787,  F/A-18 Hornet, Concorde, UH-60 Black Hawk helicopter, CRJ-900 and many more

▶ DEFAULT SCENERY
Included scenery in the base product: 
• US west coast from Sacramento to Monterey including the San Francisco Bay Area region 
• Detailed custom made airports

▶ GLOBAL SCENERY
IMPORTANT NOTE: The global scenery streaming service requires a working internect connection
Explore the world with our global scenery streaming! Global streaming is available as prepaid subscription and adds world wide scenery coverage and other global features:
• Global high-res aerial images and elevation data
• Global 3D buildings, objects and points of interest (on selected and powerful devices)
• Global night lighting
• 2000+ hand made airports
• 6000+ global airports
• 10,000+ missions based on real world flights
• 100+ hand crafted flight missions

▶ SIM FEATURES
• Pushback
• High resolution aerial images
• 3D buildings and terminals
• Dynamic aircraft lights (on selected and powerful devices)
• Optional Flight assistance with simulated copilot
• Global air traffic simulation with optional flight-paths and labels
• Instant replay with option to resume flight from that recorded state
• Go back in time and try again after a crash
• Skip forward in time along the route
• Instant selection of cold and dark, before engine start, ready for taxi, ready for takeoff, on final approach and cruise configurations
• Personal flight statistics, achievements, career progress and recorded flight paths
• Adjustable time of day
• Configurable clouds
• Adjustable wind speed, thermals and turbulence
• Various camera views in the cockpit, passenger views, external views, tower views, fly-by and more
• Optional landmark labels for mountains, lakes and cities

▶ AIRCRAFT FEATURES
• Realistic flight physics
• Fully simulated landing gear physics
• Fully simulated wing flex (not just an animation) on nearly all aircraft
• Independent simulation of all flight control actuators and flight control surfaces
• Cold and Dark option and engine start procedures in all aircraft, except after-burning jets
• Highly detailed, animated and interactive 3D cockpits
• Highly sophisticated autopilot and flight-management system
• Realistic fly-by-wire simulations
• Realistic instrument navigation (ILS, NDB, VOR, TCN)
• Interactive flight management systems (FMS)
• Real-time landing lights and other exterior lights that illuminate the ground (on selected and powerful devices)
• Realistic internal lighting

See full details per aircraft: https://www.aerofly.com/features/aircraft/

Privacy policy: https://www.aerofly.com/privacy

End User License Agreements (EULA): https://www.apple.com/legal/internet-services/itunes/dev/stdeula/

tw.trackName: Eco Power Towns （生態小鎮電力計畫）

tw.description:
生日，畢業， 婚禮， 搬遷， 開工 紀念日， 週慶等等， 怎麼記得住呀！
簡易設計， 清新畫風， 讓DDay, 圈中那一日

妳還在為照片上不請自來的過客犯愁嗎？
使用照片橡皮擦，有瑕疵的照片瞬間修復，變成完美收藏。
照片橡皮擦可以輕松幫妳去除圖片上的電線、人物、圖標、水印、文字等等雜物，就和拍照壹樣簡單。
照片橡皮擦使用智能算法自動填補受損和缺失的區域，智能填充來到了妳的手機，P圖再也不需要壹臺電腦。
特點：
- 刪除多余的人物
- 擦除照片上的電線
- 擦除臉上的粉刺，黑痣
- 修復有劃痕的舊照片
- 去除照片上意外的移動物體
- 去除照片上的水印、日期等等等等
- 簡單易用

什麽，還有不能完成的其他P圖任務，看看我們的其他軟件，總有壹款能幫到妳：
• 輕松摳圖 - 史上最強摳圖神器.
• 色彩大師 - 改變照片顏色,黑白多彩特效.
• 美圖聚焦 - 虛化背景, 模糊背景, 美化照片, 突出運動健美的妳.
• 奇幻變臉秀 - 制作變臉動畫，照片變視頻，GIF圖片.

給我們壹個評論，幫助我們提高app的功能！

Subscription:
• Payment will be charged to iTunes Account at confirmation of purchase
• Subscription automatically renews unless auto-renew is turned off at least 24-hours before the end of the current period
• Account will be charged for renewal within 24-hours prior to the end of the current period, and identify the cost of the renewal
• Subscriptions may be managed by the user and auto-renewal may be turned off by going to the user's Account Settings after purchase
• Any unused portion of a free trial period, if offered, will be forfeited when the user purchases a subscription to that publication, where applicable
- Privacy Policy: http://ptuwang.com/conf/privacy_notice_cutout.pdf

tw.description:
A simple cleanup management app that will quickly find your search!

Do you have trouble Looking for items?

Find your item quickly with "where I put it”!

Build a house, make furniture, assign lockers, and put all your belongings.

Books, important collections, hobby tools, children's toys, seasonal clothes, and items of recollections, the app will help you organize all things in the house.

tw.releaseNotes:
Improved app performance and overall stability.
Updated table colors for a better visual experience.
Important: Please delete the old table if you have used it previously.
tw.description: The table features the player as a member of a space fleet that completes missions to increase rank. Players can attain nine different ranks (listed from lowest to highest): Cadet, Ensign, Lieutenant, Captain, LT Commander, Commander, Commodore, Admiral, and Fleet Admiral. Players accept a mission by hitting "mission targets" which select which mission they will take, and by going up the "launch ramp". Each mission has a set number of things for players to do, such as hitting the "attack bumpers" (which are a set of four bumpers at the top of the table) eight times (this is the "target practice" mission). Some missions involve a number of steps which must be completed in sequence. Missions end either by being completed, or by being aborted due to running out of "fuel", as indicated by the lights in the passage that passes under the launch ramp. The "fuel" lights go out one by one at a time interval, and can be re-lit by having the ball go over them, or all at once by going up the launch ramp again. Upon completing a mission, some of the blue lights in a circle in the middle of the table turn on. When all of the lights in the blue circle turn on, the player's rank increases, and a light in the orange circle turns on.

And minor changes to 100+ airports.
tw.description:
Aerofly FS Global is one of the most sophisticated Flight Simulators for your mobile device, suitable for beginner and professional flight sim pilots alike. Explore the world of flying with extremely detailed and accurately simulated airliners, fully interactive 3D cockpits and realistic aircraft systems. Fly with complex airliners, helicopters, business jets, fighter jets and warbirds, general aviation aircraft, aerobatic stuntplanes and gliders across the photorealistic landscape.

IMPORTANT NOTE: The level of graphics details depends on your device performance and memory.

▶ AIRCRAFT
8 aircraft included in the base app:
• Airbus A320, Dash 8-Q400, Learjet 45, Cessna 172, Baron 58, Aermacchi MB339, F-15E Strike Eagle, Jungmeister

Over 30 more aircraft available as in-app purchases, like Airbus A350, Airbus A380, Boeing B777, Boeing B787,  F/A-18 Hornet, Concorde, UH-60 Black Hawk helicopter, CRJ-900 and many more

▶ DEFAULT SCENERY
Included scenery in the base product: 
• US west coast from Sacramento to Monterey including the San Francisco Bay Area region 
• Detailed custom made airports

▶ GLOBAL SCENERY
IMPORTANT NOTE: The global scenery streaming service requires a working internect connection
Explore the world with our global scenery streaming! Global streaming is available as prepaid subscription and adds world wide scenery coverage and other global features:
• Global high-res aerial images and elevation data
• Global 3D buildings, objects and points of interest (on selected and powerful devices)
• Global night lighting
• 2000+ hand made airports
• 6000+ global airports
• 10,000+ missions based on real world flights
• 100+ hand crafted flight missions

▶ SIM FEATURES
• Pushback
• High resolution aerial images
• 3D buildings and terminals
• Dynamic aircraft lights (on selected and powerful devices)
• Optional Flight assistance with simulated copilot
• Global air traffic simulation with optional flight-paths and labels
• Instant replay with option to resume flight from that recorded state
• Go back in time and try again after a crash
• Skip forward in time along the route
• Instant selection of cold and dark, before engine start, ready for taxi, ready for takeoff, on final approach and cruise configurations
• Personal flight statistics, achievements, career progress and recorded flight paths
• Adjustable time of day
• Configurable clouds
• Adjustable wind speed, thermals and turbulence
• Various camera views in the cockpit, passenger views, external views, tower views, fly-by and more
• Optional landmark labels for mountains, lakes and cities

▶ AIRCRAFT FEATURES
• Realistic flight physics
• Fully simulated landing gear physics
• Fully simulated wing flex (not just an animation) on nearly all aircraft
• Independent simulation of all flight control actuators and flight control surfaces
• Cold and Dark option and engine start procedures in all aircraft, except after-burning jets
• Highly detailed, animated and interactive 3D cockpits
• Highly sophisticated autopilot and flight-management system
• Realistic fly-by-wire simulations
• Realistic instrument navigation (ILS, NDB, VOR, TCN)
• Interactive flight management systems (FMS)
• Real-time landing lights and other exterior lights that illuminate the ground (on selected and powerful devices)
• Realistic internal lighting

See full details per aircraft: https://www.aerofly.com/features/aircraft/

Privacy policy: https://www.aerofly.com/privacy

End User License Agreements (EULA): https://www.apple.com/legal/internet-services/itunes/dev/stdeula/

us.releaseNotes:
- All the levels tested and uploaded.
- App listing localization.
- Ready for the launch!
us.description:
Can you power a tiny town.. sustainably?
Eco Power Towns is a thoughtful strategy puzzle where every placement matters. Generate clean energy using solar, wind, tidal and biomass technologies; all while managing your limited resources. Upgrade, research, and optimize your layout to reach the energy goal and light up all the cozy homes.

What to expect?
- Contains no text at all: the entire game is icon-driven and intuitive.
- Build solar panels, windmills, biomass plants, tidal generators and more.
- Hints are available in case you get stuck on a level.
- Reach energy goals before you run out of resources
- Light up cozy houses across forests, swamps, hills, and rocky terrain
- Unlock research upgrades to improve your production efficiency
- Explore handcrafted levels of increasing challenge
- Solve satisfying puzzles that reward careful planning
- Enjoy peaceful lo-fi beat vibes and a clean, minimalist art style
- A paid game: no ads, no tracking, no distractions, no data collected
- Haptic Feedback
- Game Center & Achievements

I'm a solo game developer who made this game with a lot of care and love. I hope Eco Power Towns brings you a little joy, a little challenge, and a lot of cozy energy.

Birthday, anniversaries, moving, First day of ...
How to remember them all?
DDay, simply marked down the day Celebrate each in full color.

A simple cleanup management app that will quickly find your search!

Do you have trouble Looking for items?

Find your item quickly with "where I put it”!

Build a house, make furniture, assign lockers, and put all your belongings.

Books, important collections, hobby tools, children's toys, seasonal clothes, and items of recollections, the app will help you organize all things in the house.

Airport ground maneuvering simulation of more than 40 different airports including 
London Heathrow LHR, Philadelphia PHL, Miami Intl. MIA, Singapore, New York JFK, Las Vegas LAS, São Paulo GRU, Montreal YUL, Boston BOS,  and many more. 

Different versions of airports included:
- Play the simplified version, where the airport is scaled down to an easy playable experience.
- Play the real thing. Here the whole airport is in real size displayed, where all your skills are required.

Features
- Give pushback, taxi, holding and take-off clearances. 
- Handle emergencies and try to release all flights on time in order to release the next level.

From an easy single-runway operation at the beginning to demanding hub airports with multiple active runways where all your skills are required.

pt.releaseNotes: Página localizada para falantes de português!
pt.description:
Você consegue abastecer uma pequena cidade… de forma sustentável?
Eco Power Towns é um puzzle estratégico e relaxante onde cada colocação importa. Gere energia limpa usando tecnologias solares, eólicas, de marés e biomassa — tudo enquanto administra recursos limitados. Faça melhorias, pesquise novas soluções e otimize o layout para atingir a meta de energia e iluminar todas as casas aconchegantes.

O que esperar?
-Sem nenhum texto: o jogo é totalmente intuitivo e guiado por ícones.
-Construa painéis solares, turbinas eólicas, usinas de biomassa, geradores de marés e muito mais.
-Dicas disponíveis caso você fique preso em um nível.
-Alcance as metas de energia antes que os recursos acabem.
-Ilumine casas em florestas, pântanos, colinas e terrenos rochosos.
-Desbloqueie pesquisas para melhorar a eficiência da produção.
-Explore fases artesanais com dificuldade crescente.
-Resolva puzzles que recompensam o planejamento cuidadoso.
-Trilha sonora lo-fi suave e visual minimalista e limpo.
-Jogo pago: sem anúncios, sem rastreamento, sem distrações, sem coleta de dados.
-Feedback tátil.
-Game Center e Conquistas.

Sou um desenvolvedor solo e fiz este jogo com muito carinho e dedicação. Espero que Eco Power Towns traga um pouco de alegria, um pouco de desafio e muita energia aconchegante para você.

Birthday, anniversaries, moving, First day of ...

pt.description:
O Aerofly FS Global é um dos simuladores de voo mais sofisticados para seu dispositivo móvel, adequado tanto para pilotos de voo iniciantes quanto para profissionais. Explore o mundo da aviação com aviões extremamente detalhados e simulados com precisão, cockpits 3D totalmente interativos e sistemas de aeronaves realistas. Voe com aviões complexos, helicópteros, jatos executivos, caças e aviões de guerra, aeronaves de aviação geral, aviões acrobáticos e planadores em um cenário fotorrealista.

OBSERVAÇÃO IMPORTANTE: o nível de detalhes dos gráficos depende do desempenho e da memória de seu dispositivo.

AERONAVES
8 aeronaves incluídas no aplicativo básico:
- Airbus A320, Dash 8-Q400, Learjet 45, Cessna 172, Baron 58, Aermacchi MB339, F-15E Strike Eagle, Jungmeister

Mais de 30 outras aeronaves disponíveis como compras no aplicativo, como Airbus A350, Airbus A380, Boeing B777, Boeing B787, F/A-18 Hornet, Concorde, helicóptero UH-60 Black Hawk, CRJ-900 e muito mais

CENÁRIO PADRÃO
Cenário incluído no produto básico:
- Costa oeste dos EUA, de Sacramento a Monterey, incluindo a região da área da Baía de São Francisco
- Aeroportos detalhados feitos sob medida

CENÁRIO GLOBAL
OBSERVAÇÃO IMPORTANTE: O serviço de streaming de cenários globais requer uma conexão de internet ativa
Explore o mundo com nosso streaming de cenários globais! O streaming global está disponível como assinatura pré-paga e adiciona cobertura de cenário mundial e outros recursos globais:
- Imagens aéreas globais de alta resolução e dados de elevação
- Edifícios, objetos e pontos de interesse globais em 3D (em dispositivos selecionados e potentes)
- Iluminação noturna global
- Mais de 2.000 aeroportos feitos à mão
- Mais de 6.000 aeroportos globais
- Mais de 10.000 missões baseadas em voos do mundo real
- Mais de 100 missões de voo feitas à mão

RECURSOS DO SIM
- Recuo
- Imagens aéreas de alta resolução
- Edifícios e terminais em 3D
- Luzes dinâmicas da aeronave (em dispositivos selecionados e potentes)
- Assistência de voo opcional com copiloto simulado
- Simulação de tráfego aéreo global com rotas e rótulos de voo opcionais
- Repetição instantânea com opção de retomar o voo a partir do estado registrado
- Volte no tempo e tente novamente após um acidente
- Avançar no tempo ao longo da rota
- Seleção instantânea de configurações de frio e escuro, antes da partida do motor, pronto para taxiamento, pronto para decolagem, na aproximação final e em cruzeiro
- Estatísticas pessoais de voo, conquistas, progresso na carreira e trajetórias de voo registradas
- Hora do dia ajustável
- Nuvens configuráveis
- Velocidade do vento, térmicas e turbulência ajustáveis
- Várias visualizações de câmera no cockpit, visualizações do passageiro, visualizações externas, visualizações da torre, fly-by e muito mais
- Etiquetas de pontos de referência opcionais para montanhas, lagos e cidades

RECURSOS DA AERONAVE
- Física de voo realista
- Física do trem de pouso totalmente simulada
- Flexão de asa totalmente simulada (não apenas uma animação) em quase todas as aeronaves
- Simulação independente de todos os atuadores de controle de voo e superfícies de controle de voo
- Opção de frio e escuro e procedimentos de partida do motor em todas as aeronaves, exceto jatos de pós-combustão
- Cockpits 3D altamente detalhados, animados e interativos
- Piloto automático e sistema de gerenciamento de voo altamente sofisticados
- Simulações realistas de fly-by-wire
- Navegação por instrumentos realista (ILS, NDB, VOR, TCN)
- Sistemas interativos de gerenciamento de voo (FMS)
- Luzes de pouso em tempo real e outras luzes externas que iluminam o solo (em dispositivos selecionados e potentes)
- Iluminação interna realista

Veja todos os detalhes por aeronave: https://www.aerofly.com/features/aircraft/

Política de privacidade: https://www.aerofly.com/privacy

Contratos de licença de usuário final (EULA): https://www.apple.com/legal/internet-services/itunes/dev/stdeula/

advisories: Uso pouco frequente/moderado de violência fantástica ou em desenhos animados
pt.description:
Prepare-se para entrar em ação e mostrar ao Reino quem é o verdadeiro chefe no melhor jogo de defesa de torres!

Enfrente impérios de poderosos inimigos. Ataque os chefes supremos, desbloqueando e mudando para novas torres. Treine heróis lendários e conquiste usando sua estratégia neste incrível jogo tower defense.

O Kingdom Rush Vengeance lhe dará horas e horas de partidas do melhor jogo de defesa de torres disponível! E o melhor, jogos sem net, jogue mesmo sem internet!

Heróis, seu Exército, Inimigos e lendárias tower defense lutas de chefe!
- 17 Poderosos HERÓIS que acatam as suas ordens sem hesitar
- Evolua seus heróis e melhore suas habilidades
- 10+ PEÇAS E ARTEFATOS para aquela ação extra na batalha na defesa de torres.
- NOVOS PODERES E ARMADURAS para vencer seus inimigos, estilo defesa de torres!
- 30 UPGRADES para treinar seu exército da sua maneira.
- 60+ INIMIGOS MORTAIS que colocarão à prova toda a sua inteligência e habilidades estratégicas
- CORRA PARA SALVAR O REINO ao combater 6 poderosos chefes nas batalhas contra chefe mais lendárias!

Seleção Épica de Torres e Upgrades
- 22 NOVAS TORRES para defender seu reino
- HABILIDADES ÚNICAS E PODERES ESPECIAIS para cada torre
- Escolha seu arsenal de torres e execute sua estratégia. 

Crie combinações devastadoras de torres, habilidades e poderes especiais para deter seus inimigos!

Jogo de Defesa de Torres Quase Sem Fim

- 42 ETAPAS DE DESAFIO que testarão suas habilidades
- 9 REINOS DIFERENTES para conquistar e explorar no estilo tower defense
- 60+ CONQUISTAS, segredos escondidos e coisas divertidas para você brincar e descobrir enquanto explora o reino!
- DESAFIOS HERÓICOS E DE FERRO em todas as fases
- CASUAL, NORMAL, VETERANO OU IMPOSSÍVEL dificuldade para todos os níveis
- Convocar ondas inimigas mais rapidamente para ganhar ouro extra

Jogos Sem Net Incríveis de Defesa de Torre

Sem Wi-Fi em sua Dark Tower?

- JOGOS SEM NET - jogue offline, quando não tiver wifi
- JOGO OFFLINE - acesse mesmo sem conexão à internet
- Você pode escolher jogar o Kingdom Rush Vengeance como seu jogo Tower Defence offline. 

--------------------------------------------------

Confira aqui as últimas notícias do Lorde Vez'nan:
https://www.kingdomrushvengeance.com/

Termos e Condições:
https://www.ironhidegames.com/TermsOfService

Política de Privacidade:
https://www.ironhidegames.com/PrivacyPolicy

Criadores de vídeo, criadores de podcast e streamers:
Adoraríamos ver seu conteúdo no Youtube e no Twitch! Nós apoiamos e promovemos os criadores de canais, portanto, se você quiser que mostremos seus vídeos ou quiser saber mais sobre nossos jogos, sinta-se à vontade para entrar em contato, é só enviar um email para contact@ironhidegames.com
